name: idlepay
description: Earn revenue from sponsored lines while you code with Claude Code (CLI & extension) or the OpenAI Codex extension panel — in VS Code, Cursor & Windsurf.

commands.title: idlepay: Sign out (pause earning on this device)
idlepay: Restore agent ad surfaces to default (Claude Code + Codex)

idlepay.patchSpinner.description: Show idlepay sponsored lines in the Claude Code spinner. OPT-IN: this modifies the local Claude Code binary (fully reversible via 'idlepay: Restore agent ad surfaces to default'). The extension asks once on first run; installs upgrading from ≤0.0.16 keep their previous behavior.

idlepay.patchCodex.description: Show idlepay sponsored lines in the OpenAI Codex panel (openai.chatgpt). OPT-IN and independent of the Claude Code setting: this modifies the local Codex extension's webview files (fully reversible via 'idlepay: Restore agent ad surfaces to default'). The extension asks once, only if Codex is installed.

claudeCode.spinnerVerbs.markdownDescription: Managed by idlepay — the sponsored spinner verbs shown in the Claude Code panel. Registered here so idlepay can write it via the settings API (Claude Code reads this key but does not contribute it, which otherwise makes `config.update` reject the write).
